title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 55.260 - Records clerk to report to auditor within ten days after any judgment (second class and certain first class counties)
text:
55.260.  Records clerk to report to auditor within ten days after any judgment (second class and certain first class counties). — Every clerk in charge of the records of each associate circuit judge of each county of the first class not having a charter form of government and of each county of the second class shall, within ten days after any judgment has been rendered in his court against any person for a fine or forfeiture, report to the auditor the name of the party against whom such judgment was rendered, the amount of the judgment, and on what account rendered.
(RSMo 1939 § 13878, A.L. 1973 H.B. 678, A.L. 1978 H.B. 1634) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 12215; 1919 § 9613; 1909 § 3834 
Effective 1-02-79
